query:
SELECT ap.id as pdiId, ap.trilhaId, t.name as trilhaNome
FROM assessment_pdi ap
LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON t.id = ap.trilhaId
WHERE ap.alunoId = 30080;

SELECT ac.competenciaId, c.nome as compNome
FROM assessment_competencias ac
LEFT JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId
WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId = 60395;
